penalties.description: Visible deviations from the marked circle line, with cutting extending outside the marked boundary in multiple locations.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on task completion and phase detection. There was disagreement on exact completion time (Claude: 126s, GPT: 121s) and penalty severity (Claude: 3 deviations/15pts, GPT: 1 deviation/10pts). Consensus uses averaged timing and moderate penalty assessment based on both models observing line deviations outside the marked boundary.

disagreements.rationale: Both models identified clear start and end points but differed by 5 seconds. Averaging provides reasonable compromise given frame-based timing uncertainty.

Both models observed line deviations outside the marked boundary. Claude's detailed frame analysis suggests multiple deviations, while GPT noted general deviation. Consensus reflects moderate penalty between the two assessments.
